message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Eurobarometer 52.0 (Oct-Nov 1999)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10960","justification":"Includes Malta in a pre‑2000 wave with items on economic situation, reform, and development; useful baseline at turn of the decade for economic systems perceptions in Malta."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 56.2 (Sep-Oct 2001)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10991","justification":"Covers Malta and contains questions on economic situation, EU enlargement, and development-related attitudes at the start of the 2000s."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 58.1 (Oct-Nov 2002)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10996","justification":"Includes Malta; tracks public evaluations of economic conditions and expectations related to economic development before EU accession (2004)."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 60.1 (Oct-Nov 2003)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11003","justification":"Malta sample with indicators on national and personal economic situation and economic optimism, relevant to development trajectory pre‑EU entry."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 62.0 (Oct-Nov 2004)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11005","justification":"Post‑accession survey including Malta; covers economic situation, growth expectations, and views on the EU’s economic role in development."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 64.2 (Nov-Dec 2005)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11009","justification":"Contains Malta data on evaluations of the national economy, employment, and development-related policy perceptions mid‑decade."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 66.1 (Sep-Oct 2006)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11013","justification":"Malta respondents surveyed on economic situation, economic expectations, and support for EU economic and social policies affecting development."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 68.1 (Sep-Nov 2007)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11016","justification":"Includes Malta; measures opinions on national and EU‑level economic performance, growth, and development‑oriented policies late in the 2000s."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 70.1 (Oct-Nov 2008)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11019","justification":"Provides Malta microdata during the onset of the global financial crisis, with perceptions of economic system functioning and development prospects."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 72.4 (Oct-Nov 2009)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11023","justification":"Covers Malta near the end of the decade; includes indicators on economic situation, crisis impacts, and expectations about future economic development."}]}
